text:
I'm having the same issue.  Now stuck with 10.1-RELEASE-p10.

This is a FreeBSD VM on CloudAtCost:

uname -a
FreeBSD daemon 10.1-RELEASE-p10 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p10 #0: Wed May 13 06:54:13 UTC 2015     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
